intro: Geocaryum bornmuelleri, also known as Bornmüller's geocaryum, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and inflammation, due to its potential antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Geocaryum bornmuelleri include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Geocaryum bornmuelleri is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to aid in digestion and relieve inflammation.
